name: Apollo Silver Corp.
description: Apollo Silver Corp. is a Canada-based junior exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of silver-dominant projects in mining-friendly jurisdictions in North America. The company's flagship project is the Waterloo Silver-Barite Project located in San Bernardino County, California, which represents one of the largest undeveloped silver resources in the United States. Apollo Silver also holds the Silver District Project in Arizona, further expanding its portfolio of advanced-stage silver exploration assets.
